title: rubus × lasiophyllus
intro: Rubus × lasiophyllus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan bramble, is a hybrid plant species within the Rubus genus. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its roots, which contain anthocyanins and phenolic acids, exhibiting antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Rubus × lasiophyllus include its potential to help reduce inflammation, alleviate symptoms of arthritis, and support cardiovascular health. Rubus × lasiophyllus can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusion, decoction, or tincture, with the leaves and roots being commonly used in traditional medicine.
